# RokdBot - Rise of Kingdoms Bot Farm Service

## About
RokdBot is a cloud-hosted bot farm service for Rise of Kingdoms (RoK). We run bots on our servers for customers — no software download required. Customers choose a package, pay via VietQR (Vietnam) or PayPal (international), and our team sets up the bot within 24 hours.

## Services (29 automated features)

### Farm & Gather (7)
- Auto gather resources (food, wood, stone, gold) 24/7
- Auto gather gems (home kingdom + KvK map optimized)
- Auto collect alliance territory resources
- Auto collect city resources
- Auto transport/transfer resources between accounts
- Auto use items from inventory
- Auto use speedups (configurable)

### Combat (5) — includes 2 UNIQUE features
- Auto fight barbarians (single target)
- [UNIQUE] Spam Barbarians — summon barbarians around current location using items
- [UNIQUE] Barbarian Luring + AOE — lure barbarians together then use AOE skill to hit multiple at once, farms AP 3-5x faster
- Auto farm Marauders & special events (Lohar, etc.)
- Auto participate in alliance rallies

### City & Development (3)
- Auto upgrade buildings
- Auto research technology
- Auto train troops (all types)

### Alliance (4)
- Auto help alliance members
- Auto collect alliance gifts
- Auto donate alliance technology
- Auto open reports/mail

### Daily Tasks & Collection (6)
- Auto collect VIP gifts
- Auto open daily task chests
- Auto open free tavern chests
- Auto visit tribal villages
- Auto investigate mysterious caves (High/Medium/Low)
- Auto explore fog (normal + KvK map)

### Safety & Utility (4)
- Auto heal troops
- Auto activate shield
- Auto solve captcha
- Auto teleport/relocate city

## Pricing (VND / USD)
- Trial Package: 150,000 VND (~$6 USD) / 7 days — new customers only
- Basic Package: 750,000 VND (~$30 USD) / 30 days — 1 account
- Premium Package: 900,000 VND (~$36 USD) / 30 days — custom strategy
- Ultimate Package: 1,200,000 VND (~$48 USD) / 30 days — multi-account + VIP

## Payment Methods
- VietQR (instant bank transfer via QR code) — Vietnam customers
- PayPal — international customers

## How It Works
1. Choose a package on rokdbot.com
2. Pay via VietQR or PayPal
3. Contact us on Discord or Zalo with your order code + game account info
4. Bot is set up and running within 24 hours

## Contact
- Website: https://rokdbot.com
- Discord: https://discord.gg/UPuFYCw4JG
- Zalo: https://zalo.me/g/rqgqyd878

## Technical
- Frontend: React + TypeScript + Vite + Tailwind CSS
- Backend: Supabase (PostgreSQL + Edge Functions)
- Payment: SePay webhook + VietQR API + PayPal
- Hosting: Vercel
